rule_hits.summary: Experiments are conducted on eBay search logs to evaluate the effectiveness of delta features. Results show significant improvements in MRR with a neighborhood size of 3, partic...
The paper cites various sources on learning to rank, click-through data, and search result diversification, providing a comprehensive bibliography.
The introduction discusses the importance of ranking items in eCommerce search and the limitations of current ranking functions. It proposes incorporating neighborhood influence...
Previous research on the impact of neighborhood on clickability and user browsing behavior is reviewed, setting the context for extending this to eCommerce search.
